text: Bitcoin and Ethereum are both in mild retreat, with Ether underperforming Bitcoin by 1.5 points, suggesting some rotation away from altcoins toward the largest asset. The Fear & Greed index sits at 17 (Extreme Fear) and has worsened over the past week, signaling investor anxiety, though at $74B in 24-hour volume the market isn't panicking into a liquidity crisis. Bitcoin dominance holding above 56% indicates defensive positioning—traders favoring the perceived safer major rather than spreading capital into smaller-cap alts.
